SPEED AND CONSUMPTIONS AT SEA
SPEED/CONSUMPTION IS GIVEN IN GOOD WEATHER DAYS ONLY AND UNDERSTOOD TO MEAN DAYS
DEFINED THE ONES OF 24 CONSECUTIVE STEAMING HOURS RUNNING FROM NOON TO NOON IN
OPEN AND DEEP SEA, IN WINDS UP TO AND INCLUDING BEAUFORT 4 (I.E UP TO 16 KTS)
AND/OR SEA STATE 3 DEFINED UP TO 1.25M SIGNIFICANT COMBINED WAVE HEIGHT, WITH NO
NEGATIVE INFLUENCE BY SWELL/ NO ADVERSE CURRENTS. FAVORABLE CURRENTS ARE NOT TO
BE TAKEN INTO ACCOUNT AND NOT ANY DEDUCTION IS ALLOWED DUE TO CURRENT FACTOR IN
THE VESSEL\'S AVERAGE SPEED. EXTRAPOLATION OF "GOOD WEATHER" PERFORMANCE FOR "BAD
WEATHER" PERIODS IS NOT ALLOWED.
ALL 24 CONSECUTIVE HOURS ARE TO BE IN GOOD WEATHER.
VSLS CONSUMES MDO IN MAIN ENGINE WHILE MANEUVERING IN/OUT OF OF PORTS, CANALS,
RIVERS, NARROW WATERS, FOGS ETC.
FUEL USED FOR GENERATING PLANT: LSFO 380 CST RMG35 FUEL USED FOR INCINERATOR :
LSMGO DMA
